feedItems.description: allocated £78.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£176 per resident)
allocated £39.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£89 per resident)
allocated £185.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£414 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £114 (5.2%) to £2322
